nasb.text: These are those who were numbered of the Levites according to their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites; of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

esv.text: This was the list of the Levites according to their clans: of Gershon, the clan of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the clan of the Kohathites; of Merari, the clan of the Merarites.

cnv.text: 以下是按著家族被數點的利未人：屬革順的，有革順家族；屬哥轄的，有哥轄家族；屬米拉利的，有米拉利家族。

ccb.text: 利未的子孙有革顺族、哥辖族和米拉利族。
